title: Socket - REKT
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by donateToReserves on lending protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls donateToReserves() after a flash loan borrow in the same tx

red_flags: Unusual sequence of flash loan and reserves donation
monitoring_rules: BLOCK FLASHLOAN_BORROW -> DONATE_TO_RESERVES in single tx
summary: The attacker exploited a flash loan to manipulate the lending protocol's reserves, draining funds. A guard could have blocked such transactions by detecting the sequence of flash loan followed by donating to reserves.
